body: The choropleth legend overlaps the city labels at small widths. Need to reposition or make it responsive before the final presentation.
title: Choropleth legend overlaps city labels on narrow screens

body: Census tract joins are dropping ~40 tracts because of a FIPS code type mismatch. Cast both keys to character before the merge.
title: FIPS code mismatch drops tracts in tract-level join

body: Add a ggplot helper that standardizes our theme (fonts, gridlines, palette) so every notebook chart matches the slide deck.
title: Add shared ggplot theme helper for consistent chart styling

body: The README still points at the old notebook layout. Update setup steps for the renv lockfile and the data download script.
title: Update README setup steps for renv and data download

body: Heat index raster from the NASA pull is in Kelvin in some tiles and Celsius in others. Normalize units before overlaying zoning polygons.
title: Normalize raster temperature units across NASA tiles

body: PR to swap the static heat map for an interactive leaflet version so reviewers can pan between the two case cities.
title: PR: interactive leaflet map for two-city comparison

body: Notebook 03 reruns the full geocode every time. Cache the geocoded points to disk so the build doesn't take 20 minutes.
title: Cache geocoded points to speed up notebook 03

body: The thesis rent-burden script assumes 2020 ACS columns. Parameterize the year so we can swap in the 2022 5-year estimates.
title: Parameterize ACS survey year in rent-burden script

body: Displacement index returns NA for tracts with zero baseline population. Decide whether to drop or impute and document the choice.
title: Displacement index produces NA for zero-population tracts

body: The events page list isn't sorted by date, so the fall mixer shows below past events. Sort descending by start date.
title: Events page not sorted by date

body: Add an Eventbrite RSVP button to each event card and link it to the matching event id.
title: Add Eventbrite RSVP button to event cards

body: Newsletter signup form posts to the wrong list id after the Mailchimp audience change. Update the form action.
title: Newsletter signup posts to wrong Mailchimp list id

body: PR migrating the legacy console.log calls to the structured logger so Sentry breadcrumbs are useful.
title: PR: migrate console logs to structured logger

body: Map view throws when a route has no waypoints. Top Sentry error this week — guard the render before the array access.
title: Map view crashes on routes with no waypoints

body: Geocoder rate limit returns 429 with no backoff, dropping batches. Add exponential backoff and a small request cache.
title: Geocoder 429s drop batches without backoff

body: Add a short methods note explaining the dark/light map theme tokens so reviewers know the palette is colorblind-safe.
title: Document colorblind-safe map theme tokens

body: Blog build fails on posts with footnotes because the markdown plugin isn't registered. Add the plugin to the config.
title: Build fails on posts with footnotes

body: Wire PostHog so I can see which research-recap posts readers actually finish. Keep it cookieless.
title: Add cookieless PostHog analytics to blog

body: Pull the reusable scale_fill helpers out of the thesis repo into here so I stop copy-pasting them between projects.
title: Extract reusable scale_fill helpers into shared notes repo

body: Add a short worked example of a weighted bootstrap CI so I have it for the capstone back-tests.
title: Add weighted bootstrap confidence interval example
